title: Entity Sniff Behavior
description: Allows this entity to detect the nearest player within "sniffing_radius" and update its "minecraft:suspect_tracking" component state

cooldown_range.title: Cooldown Range

duration.title: Duration
duration.description:
Sniffing duration in seconds

Sample values:
• warden: 4.16

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• warden: 6

sniffing_radius.title: Sniffing Radius
sniffing_radius.description:
Mob detection radius

Sample values:
• warden: 24

suspicion_radius_horizontal.title: Suspicion Radius Horizontal
suspicion_radius_horizontal.description:
Mob suspicion horizontal radius. When a player is within this radius horizontally, the anger level towards that player is increased

Sample values:
• warden: 6

suspicion_radius_vertical.title: Suspicion Radius Vertical
suspicion_radius_vertical.description:
Mob suspicion vertical radius. When a player is within this radius vertically, the anger level towards that player is increased

Sample values:
• warden: 20
